headline.text: IN ONLY SIX MONTHS, that formerly desperate man bought a $385,000 house with half down, and became a millionaire in less than a year

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: Poor person becoming rich quickly without effort
schema_analysis.whitespace_territory: Personal transformation without willpower or positive thinking

lead.full_text: Sitting in his sister-in-law's driveway, the broke, jobless, and homeless man pounded his fists on the steering wheel, crying. Sobbing. Muttering out loud to no one in particular, 'Why can't anything go right for me? Why does everything I try go so wrong? When did I become such a worthless loser? How am I going to get my wife and kids out of this basement into a house?' Then, it struck him like a tire iron to the face. He sat up, wiped his eyes, looking dumbstruck, saying to himself, 'Holy cow. How could I have forgotten that? It worked for me before. I KNOW it'll work again! How could I have been such a moron?'

schema_analysis.expectation_violated: From complete desperation to sudden realization

three_part_structure.villain: Your internal self-image buried deep in your subconscious mind
three_part_structure.mechanism: Automatic goal-seeking device (like guided missile technology)

narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: How you've become who you are is not your fault - it's your self-image programming
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: Your subconscious self-image controls EVERYTHING - what you do, where you go, who you're with, how much you make, your health, your relationships
narrative_reorganization.new_self_concept: You have an automatic success mechanism that can be reprogrammed

fssit_candidates.statement: Your subconscious self-image controls EVERYTHING. What we do, and what we don't do. Where we go. Where we live. Who we end up getting in relationships with and how those relationships go. What we do for a living. How much money we make.

Dr. Maltz figured out that our past experiences and thoughts have planted the unsuccessful self-image in our subconscious... and that once we substitute a new, healthy, success-filled self-image in place of the previous one... ALL THE THINGS WE WANT IN LIFE WILL COME TO US AS IF DIRECTED BY AN AUTOMATIC GUIDANCE SYSTEM!
Our subconscious mind cannot distinguish fantasy from fact. Our internal self-image buried deep within the subconscious only knows what we tell it to know.
How you've become who you are and who your self-image tells you to be... is not your fault!
The human mind functions much like a goal-seeking device similar to those used to guide missiles on auto-pilot!

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: Concentrated in middle section with strong self-image explanation, repeated reinforcement throughout

key_quotes: You will NEVER be different from what your self-image says you are and that if you change your self-image to 'think' of yourself as the person you want to be... you will AUTOMATICALLY become that new person!

I got rid of my duodenal ulcer without any medication! I changed my major without the fear or trepidation I had of making changes! I became so relaxed with schoolwork that my grades climbed up to all B's and A's!
Nothing worked until I discovered how to re-engineer my self-image with Psycho-Cybernetics!
